findings.issue: 25 acceptance criteria checkboxes against a warning threshold of 10 for size M. Count dropped from ~29 to 25 after round-1 fixes but still exceeds threshold. Granularity is justified by multi-component scope (new Activity + new process + new handler + 2 UI touchpoints + 5 new classes + manifest change). Previously reviewed and accepted by user as cosmetic.
findings.fix: No action required — user consciously kept size M. Acceptable for a hotfix-interlude feature with well-isolated components. If desired, add a one-line note in frontmatter explaining the criteria granularity.

findings.issue: The cross-reference «упомянутый в deployment.md § Logging» in the Зачем section is unverifiable from the spec alone. If deployment.md does not yet contain that entry, the reference dangles. Previously flagged; user accepted it as natural prose.
findings.fix: Cosmetic only — either verify the deployment.md section exists, or soften to «отмечено в backlog».

7tap_timing_rewording.detail: Criterion now reads «7 последовательных тапов с паузой между соседними тапами не более 2 секунд» (line 81), matching the user-flow description exactly. Previous ambiguous phrasing removed.

untestable_any_thread_criterion.detail: The old «Handler ловит exceptions с любого потока» criterion is gone. Replaced with an observable, testable criterion: crash.log is present on next launch after an uncaught exception. No untestable language remains in any checkbox.

size_warning.detail: Criteria count is now 25 (was ~29). Still above the 10-item threshold for M, but user accepted this as a documentation call. Remains a minor warning, not a blocker.

deployment_md_crossref.detail: Reference softened to natural prose but still present. User accepted. No new regressions introduced.

covered: trigger: crash during model initialization on friend's device (Q1)
all 3 crash types in scope: snackbar/Android-dialog/silent (Q2)
log content: device info, active model, ERROR-only logcat, errors.log (Q2)
no share intent — SAF save-to-file only (Q2)
UI entry points: crash screen (immediate) + About (standalone, not in overflow) (Q3)
privacy: no filtering in test phase (Q3)
About export button always accessible regardless of crash state (Q4)
dev-gesture 7 taps on version string as test-crash trigger (Q5)
size caps: crash.log 100 KB, logcat 100 KB (Q6)
dev-gesture throws on main thread in onClick (Q6)

summary: Раунд-1: все три реальные проблемы устранены без регрессий. Формулировка 7-тап жеста исправлена точно. Нетестируемый критерий «любой поток» удалён и заменён наблюдаемым поведением. Спек остаётся approved. Два minor-пункта перенесены из раунда-1 как сознательно принятые пользователем — ни один из них не является блокером.
